title: CommandBind
description: Bind Minecraft commands to keyboard keys
body:
![apex](https://i.imgur.com/2pvxufW.png)[APEXNODES- Лучший хостинг](https://client.apexnodes.xyz/aff.php?aff=205)


# 🔑 CommandBind
CommandBind is a lightweight yet powerful tool that gives you full control over your Minecraft keybindings.
It’s designed for both casual players and modpack creators who need more flexibility when managing hotkeys and custom actions.

# ✨ Features

 Create and edit custom key combinations.

 Bind keys to any action — commands, interactions, or mod features.

 Trigger pre-defined actions with a single press.

 Clean and intuitive in-game configuration menu.


# 🎯 Example Use Cases

Quickly run commands like /home, /spawn, or /warp.

Activate mod-specific abilities (flight, night vision, build modes).

# ⚙️ Configuration

Full in-game configuration menu for keybinds.

External config file support — useful for servers and modpacks.

Multiple profiles for different playstyles or worlds.

# 📦 Compatibility

Works seamlessly with Forge

Compatible with most popular mods and utilities.

✅ Why Choose This Mod?

Lightweight and easy to use.

Zero performance impact.
